TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Reuven Rivlin kakilimaan misiwkay tu tademaw nu ihekalay a kanatal nilacul nalecuhan ciniza i 9 a bulad 9 a demiad 1939 a mihcaan, Reuven Rivlin, u misingkiway a tademaw. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Israel ayza sa ci Reuven Rivlin, micakat a demiad sa i 2014 a mihcaan 7 a bulad 24 a demiad. u Iserael a kanatal sa, saicelangay a kanatal kuyni.
S.PHON: *…ôu*…ôn *i*r~…ĺin kakir~…ĺimaan misiwkaj tu tad…ômaw nu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kanatar~…ĺ nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶iniza i * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad **** a mińß ¶aan, *…ôu*…ôn *i*r~…ĺin, u misiŇčkiwaj a tad…ômaw. u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu isra…ôr~…ĺ ajza sa ¶i *…ôu*…ôn *i*r~…ĺin, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad. u is…ôra…ôr~…ĺ a kanatar~…ĺ sa, sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a kanatar~…ĺ kujni.
S.FORM: Reuven Rivlin kakilimaan misiwkay tu tademaw nu ihekalay a kanatal nilacul nalecuhan ciniza i 9 a bulad 9 a demiad 1939 a mihcaan, Reuven Rivlin, u misingkiway a tademaw. u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Israel ayza sa ci Reuven Rivlin, micakat a demiad sa i 2014 a mihcaan 7 a bulad 24 a demiad. u Iserael a kanatal sa, saicelangay a kanatal kuyni.
